mapper.select: SELECT m.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, u.real_name AS doctor_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN patient p ON m.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE m.record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT m.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, u.real_name AS doctor_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN patient p ON m.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE m.reg_id = #{regId} ORDER BY m.record_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, u.real_name AS doctor_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN patient p ON m.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE m.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record (reg_id, patient_id, doctor_id, chief_complaint, present_illness, past_illness, physical_exam, diagnosis, advice, disease_code, disease_name) VALUES (#{regId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{presentIllness}, #{pastIllness}, #{physicalExam}, #{diagnosis}, #{advice}, #{diseaseCode}, #{diseaseName})
